success_criteria: Zero linting errors; Prettier formatting compliance; Commit message follows Conventional Commits standard.
business_impact: Maintains code style consistency and basic syntax validity.

success_criteria: NestJS (Backend) and Next.js (Frontend) compile without errors; Docker images build successfully; No circular dependencies detected.
escalation_procedure: Notify developer via CI slack bot.
business_impact: Prevents broken artifacts from reaching test environments.

success_criteria: Overall coverage > 80%; Auth Service coverage > 95%; Finance Webhook Handler > 100%; PII Sanitization Logic > 98%; All critical path tests pass.
escalation_procedure: Block PR merge until coverage targets are met.
business_impact: Ensures core business logic (Security, Financials) is robust against regression.

success_criteria: Zero Critical/High vulnerabilities in dependencies; No secrets detected in code; SAST scan passes default ruleset.
tools_used: Snyk / OWASP Dependency Check, SonarQube, GitGuardian
escalation_procedure: Critical vulnerabilities halt pipeline; Security Lead override required for false positives.
business_impact: Prevents introduction of known CVEs and credential leakage.

success_criteria: 100% pass rate on Stripe Webhook Idempotency tests; Vector Search queries return valid results; Database migrations execute successfully.
business_impact: Verifies service interoperability and database integrity.

success_criteria: Terraform plan validates against policy (e.g., no public S3 buckets, RDS encrypted at rest); Cost estimation within budget variance (<10%).
escalation_procedure: DevOps Lead review required for policy exceptions.
business_impact: Prevents misconfiguration and cloud security breaches.

success_criteria: 100% Pass rate for Critical User Journeys: 'Admin Login', 'SOW Upload & Extraction', 'Vendor Proposal Submission'.
escalation_procedure: Release blocked if critical flows fail; Non-critical failures trigger warning.
business_impact: Validates full system functionality from user perspective.

success_criteria: API p95 Response Time < 200ms; Vector Search p95 < 250ms; Frontend LCP < 2.5s; Error rate < 1% under load.
escalation_procedure: Performance regression must be fixed or waived by Product Owner.
business_impact: Ensures system meets NFRs for latency and user experience.

success_criteria: All prior gates passed; Change Request approved; Rollback plan verified; Monitoring dashboards active.
business_impact: Final go/no-go decision point for production changes.

success_criteria: Health check endpoints return 200 OK; Error rate < 0.1% for first 15 mins; Database CPU < 60%.
escalation_procedure: Automatic rollback triggers if error rate threshold exceeded.
